ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_code" INTEGER /* Product code or SKU */,
  "old_price" TEXT /* Original price of the product */,
  "on_sale_price" TEXT /* Sale price of the product */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the product page */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., tops, bottoms) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the product was added to the inventory */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date when the product was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES product_departments ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the department manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the department operates in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_departments" (
  "product_department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_departments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "measurement" TEXT /* Actual measurement of the size (e.g., 10 inches, 25 cm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hexadecimal color code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size available for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_colors" (
  "product_color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the color available for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_colors_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_colors_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the inventory is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sale occurred */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sale occurred */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the price change */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "old_price" TEXT /* Old price of the product */,
  "new_price" TEXT /* New price of the product */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the price change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the price change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, staff, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date of the view */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to view the product (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from where the product was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_views_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the product (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "not_helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review not helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
